data.title: Genuine Parts split will accelerate B2B digital strategy
data.description: Separation reflects a broader shift in wholesale distribution, where digital capability is increasingly central to market share gains.

data.title: Radial launches new Commerce Solutions services for payments and fraud prevention
data.description: The new options mark an expansion for Radial as it groups technology-driven offerings into the Commerce Solution portfolio as it prepares to transition toward becoming paxon in 2026.

data.title: Protolabs launches ProDesk to expand AI quoting and production management
data.description: The platform includes a “Production Catalog” that allows customers to designate approved parts for ongoing manufacturing and reorder them without restarting the quoting process.

data.title: Salesforce to acquire Cimulate in agentic commerce expansion
data.description: Salesforce said Cimulate’s technology will be integrated into its Agentforce Commerce platform to improve search and product discovery for retailers.

data.title: Ecommerce earnings recap: What you missed from Crocs and CVS Health
data.description: Direct-to-consumer revenue was up 35.6% internationally for Crocs as it struggled on other fronts, the company shared with its latest Q4 earnings results.
